login.heading: Log in
login.resetEmailSentTitle: Email sent to reset your password
login.resetEmailSentDesc: Link with verification has been sent. Please check your email and follow the instructions to reset your password.

register.testimonialQuote: "Organize your tasks, grow your focus forest, and let AI guide your productivity — all in one cosmic workspace."

resetPassword.heading: Reset your password
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been updated. You can now log in with your new password.

errors.oauthFailed: Social login failed. Please try again.
errors.noEmail: Social account has no email. Please use an account with a valid email.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.enterEmailForReset: Please input an email to send the verification code to.
errors.rateLimitReset: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting a new reset link.
errors.emailNotFound: No account found with this email address. Please check your email or create a new account.
errors.wrongPassword: Incorrect password. Please try again or reset your password.
errors.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.rateLimitOtp: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting a new code.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be between 8 and 64 characters.
errors.passwordLetterNumber: Password must contain at least 1 letter and 1 number.
errors.otpExpired: Email verification expired. Please verify again.
errors.resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
